The '''[[Band/Legends|band]] aboard the ''[[Aurorient Express]]''''' just prior to the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] destruction was made up of two [[Mollusk/Legends|mollusk]] [[Musician/Legends|musicians]] of a [[Unidentified octopoid species|species]] and an [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Unidentified Aurorient Express band conductor|conductor]].

{{Music-stub}}
